ReplaceableSquare.name: Replaceable Square
ReplaceableSquare.description: First marker placed can be replaced with orther player's marker

DivisionSquare.name: Division Square
DivisionSquare.description: Replicate itself on one squares around, focus bonus squares

BurningSquare.name: Burning Square
BurningSquare.description: Burn one random square and destoy its marker

MoneySquare.name: Money Square
MoneySquare.description: Gives one random amount of money to the player between 1 and 10

InterestSquare.name: Interest Square
InterestSquare.description: Gives 10% of total money if a marker is placed on it at the end of the roundccc

ItemSquare.name: Item Square
ItemSquare.description: Gives one random square to the player

FirstSquare.name: First Square
FirstSquare.description: The player who place have a marker on it plays first if not multiple players activate this square

ChainSquare.name: Chain Square
ChainSquare.description: Can link to one player, who will the only one who can place markers on it

DeathSquare.name: Death Square
DeathSquare.description: Kills all markers of one random player

CreeperSquare.name: Creeper Square
CreeperSquare.description: Explodes destroying itself and all squares around him

DiamondSquare.name: Diamond Square
DiamondSquare.description: Doubles money if player balance < 20 else gives 20 $, 10% interest a the end of the round

LuckySquare.name: Lucky Square
LuckySquare.description: 50% chance of giving legendary square on placement else rare square, 50% chance to re-obtain this square in negative at the end of the round
